content: Phase 1: Install & configure PostgreSQL in container, set DATABASE_URL
Phase 1: Get Emergent LLM Key + integration playbook
Phase 1: Create POC script (Postgres + LLM enrich/predict/score + PDF + Excel)
Phase 1: Run POC script until fully green
Phase 2: Backend full implementation (models, auth, pipeline, reports, scheduler, audit)
Phase 2: Frontend full implementation (all routes, RBAC UI, exports, mobile)
Phase 2: Seed admin user (Dhananjay) + sample Mumbai businesses
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End-to-End testing with testing_agent_v3 + fix all bugs
